source: Passphrase path: CEK = Argon2id(normalize(pw)); ciphertext blob = commitment(32) || STREAM chunks where commitment = HMAC-SHA-256(HKDF(CEK, '', 'cardano-poe-passphrase-mac-v1'), SHA-256('cardano-poe-passphrase-transcript-v1' || canonicalEncode(PASSPHRASE_TRANSCRIPT))). Argon2id params are the producer default (the registry floors with p=4); the normalization profile id is bound in the transcript only, never on the wire.
